register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join GlueCrypt service
register.zkp_description: Your identity is mathematically protected. We do not store passwords or personal data.
register.info_message_1: To log in to your account from another phone or computer,
register.info_message_2: you will need this QR code, which we are about to show you.
register.warning_1: If you lose this QR code or someone takes it from you, you lose your account forever.
register.warning_2: We do not store any passwords or data, so we cannot help you regain access.
register.qr_description: Scan this QR code in GlueAuth to log in to your account on another device.
register.pin_notice: PIN code is needed to decrypt this QR code in the future
register.generating_wait: This may take a few seconds, thank you for your patience!
register.error_message: Failed to create account, please try again. If the problem persists, it is likely on our side :\

footer.description: Secure and anonymous data encryption tool using AES.
